overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a continuous forward walk through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a dry commercial street at dusk to a rainy tent-city plaza, ending with a shift into night time illuminated by neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dry urban street lined with palm trees and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: group of people standing in the distance near the buildings

entered.detail: single-story yellow building with large digital advertisement on the side
tall palm trees lining the center of the street
low concrete planters and barriers along the sidewalk
large multi-story modern building with glass facade
metal handrail in the foreground suggesting a ramp or stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dry urban street at dusk, with the camera moving forward past a yellow commercial building on the left. Palm trees line the street and a few pedestrians stand in the distance. The atmosphere is calm with natural evening light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy plaza with tent encampment and neon arch

events.description: scene transitions via dissolve effect from dry street to rainy tent city plaza
weather changes from clear to light rain with wet pavement and overcast sky

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy plaza past makeshift tents and shelters on the left

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the wall sheltering from rain

entered.detail: green and blue camping tents set up along the left side of the plaza
large curved metal framework with purple neon lighting
tall digital screen displaying animated anime character advertisement
rain-slicked concrete ground with puddle reflections

segments.scene_description: Following a dissolve transition, the scene shifts to a rainy plaza with a tent encampment on the left. A large metal arch with purple neon lights spans the background while a digital billboard displays an anime character. The ground is wet with rain, and a person sits on a bench to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tent city walkway approaching neon-lit structures

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rainy plaza approaching seated individuals near the wall

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench against the right wall
character in brown coat walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: small shop front with bright green neon signage
blue tarpaulin covering attached to the tent structures

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the rainy plaza, passing blue tarps and tents now visible on the left. The metal arch structure looms closer in the center while a neon-lit shop becomes visible ahead. Two people sit on a bench to the right, and a character in a brown coat walks past the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: night-time plaza illuminated by artificial neon lights

events.description: ambient light drops to night level, artificial neon and billboard lights become primary illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza as night falls, with neon lights reflecting off the wet ground

notable_agents.action: people sitting on benches in the dim neon light

segments.scene_description: As night falls, the scene darkens significantly with the sky becoming black. The plaza is now illuminated primarily by the purple neon arch and the bright digital billboard. The camera continues forward past the seated individuals, with the wet pavement reflecting the colorful artificial lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a futuristic city that transforms from a dry, dusk-lit commercial street into a rain-slicked neon plaza at night. It begins by gliding past a yellow building and palm trees under a calm evening sky, before the environment shifts into a rainy plaza characterized by a tent encampment and a towering purple neon arch. As the camera pushes deeper into the plaza, the scene expands to reveal blue tarps and a digital anime billboard, while a character in a brown coat crosses the path. The atmosphere then darkens as night falls, turning the sky black and shifting the illumination entirely to the vibrant artificial glow of the neon structures. Finally, the camera continues its advance over wet pavement that reflects the colorful lights of the surrounding shops and billboards.
